changes.value:
Replace the ONNX Runtime codepath in ane-embedding with native CoreML loading via the new wrappers from onnxruntime-coreml-sys.

The model flow becomes:
1. Download .mlpackage from HuggingFace (via model-loader)
2. Download tokenizer.json from same repo
3. Load .mlpackage directly via CoreML APIs (no ONNX Runtime)
4. Tokenize input → create CoreML input tensors → predict → extract embeddings

**Key changes to ane-embedding/src/model.rs:**
- Remove ORT Session, Env, SessionOptions usage
- Replace with CoreMLModel from onnxruntime-coreml-sys
- Keep tokenizer loading (already working)
- Update embed_impl to use coreml_predict instead of ORT run
- Keep the same TextEmbedder trait interface

**AneEmbeddingConfig changes (types.rs):**
- Default model_source should point to the CoreML .mlpackage on HuggingFace
- Remove ONNX-specific config if any

**Checklist:**
- [ ] Update Inner struct: replace Session/Env with CoreMLModel
- [ ] Update load_model: use coreml_load_model instead of ORT session creation
- [ ] Remove create_session_options function
- [ ] Update embed_impl: tokenize → create CoreML inputs (int32 for input_ids, attention_mask) → predict → extract float output
- [ ] Mean pooling is baked into the .mlpackage, so output is already [1, 1024] — remove Rust-side pooling
- [ ] Update embedding_dimension to read from CoreML model metadata or cache on first inference
- [ ] Update default ModelSource to point to CoreML .mlpackage on HuggingFace
- [ ] Keep tokenizer download logic from previous fix
- [ ] All existing integration tests should pass with new backend
- [ ] All tests pass
Rework ane-embedding to load CoreML .mlpackage natively

+Replace the ONNX Runtime codepath in ane-embedding with native CoreML loading via the `coreml-rs` crate.

The model flow becomes:
1. Download .mlpackage from HuggingFace (via model-loader)
2. Download tokenizer.json from same repo
3. Load .mlpackage directly via `coreml-rs` (no ONNX Runtime, no ObjC wrappers)
4. Tokenize input → create CoreML input tensors → predict → extract embeddings

**Key changes to ane-embedding/src/model.rs:**
- Remove ORT Session, Env, SessionOptions usage
- Replace with coreml-rs CoreMLModel
- Keep tokenizer loading (already working)
- Update embed_impl to use coreml-rs predict instead of ORT run
- Keep the same TextEmbedder trait interface

**AneEmbeddingConfig changes (types.rs):**
- Default model_source should point to the CoreML .mlpackage on HuggingFace
- Remove ONNX-specific config if any

**Checklist:**
- [ ] Update Inner struct: replace Session/Env with coreml-rs model handle
- [ ] Update load_model: use coreml-rs to load .mlpackage
- [ ] Remove create_session_options function and ORT dependency
- [ ] Update embed_impl: tokenize → create CoreML inputs → predict → extract float output
- [ ] Mean pooling is baked into the .mlpackage, so output is already [1, 1024] — remove Rust-side pooling
- [ ] Update embedding_dimension to read from model metadata or cache on first inference
- [ ] Update default ModelSource to point to CoreML .mlpackage on HuggingFace
- [ ] Keep tokenizer download logic from previous fix
- [ ] All existing integration tests should pass with new backend
- [ ] All tests pass
\ No newline at end of file
